query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_com_foto FROM players WHERE position = 'LAT' AND imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != '';
SELECT name FROM players WHERE position = 'LAT' AND (imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '') ORDER BY name;
